title: The Midnight Visitor
content: Shortly after midnight, someone knocked softly on Olivia's front door. Looking through the window, she saw no one outside. The neighborhood was completely quiet. A second knock followed a few moments later. Instead of opening the door immediately, she turned on the porch light and looked around carefully. There, sitting beside the entrance, was a small delivery box that had been left by a courier working late. The knocking had actually been caused by the loose lid moving in the strong wind. What initially seemed unsettling became an ordinary late-night delivery.
